message:
fix: use CLI fallback for all git-protocol remotes, not just SSH (GH#2268)

git+https:// remotes hit the same MySQL readTimeout=10s as SSH remotes,
causing bd dolt push to fail with i/o timeout. Generalize isSSHRemote to
isGitProtocolRemote to detect git+https://, git+http://, and git:// URLs
in addition to SSH, routing them all through the CLI fallback path.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
